name: macos-automator
description: AppleScript + JXA automation for any Mac app

name: home-mcp
description: HomeKit device, scene, and automation control

name: apple-events
description: Native Reminders and Calendar via EventKit

name: windows-control
description: Windows desktop interaction — click, type, screenshot, manage windows

name: imessages
description: Read and send iMessages via the macOS Messages app
setup_note: Requires Full Disk Access for your terminal in System Settings → Privacy & Security

name: gmessages
description: Google Messages SMS/RCS read/write via Android phone pairing
setup_note: Requires Go compiler to build from source, then phone pairing via QR code

name: todoist
setup_note: Requires Todoist API token from todoist.com → Settings → Integrations → Developer
